raw_consumer_statement:
I was over-charged for a purchase from XXXX Flowers. The retail company declined to explain the overcharge, so I disputed it through Citi. Citi responded by saying the retail company had provided a satisfactory written explanation. However, the link provided by Citi did NOT lead to any letter or any explanation at all for the overcharge. I still believe the charge was erroneous, and I want an explanation. Following is the only information provided to me by Citi. 

XXXX, XXXX. XXXXXXXX XXXX  {$370.00} on XX/XX/XXXX Investigation complete Resolved - Customer Responsible XX/XX/XXXX XX/XX/XXXX {$55.00} expansion arrow Dispute Details Case ID XXXX Reason for Dispute Incorrect amount Card details Card ending in - XXXX Credit Status Conditional Credit Reversed Dispute Received XX/XX/XXXX expand more button Action Required XX/XX/XXXX expand more button Resolved - Customer Responsible XX/XX/XXXX We've Completed Our Investigation A letter detailing your dispute resolution is available in your Notices & Letters. 
The conditional credit we previously issued will be reversed.
